meaning: adj.固着于土地的,为世俗利益所束缚的,讲实际的
examples: The earthbound life required no grocery stores.
It was joyful, like watching dolphins in the air, and they surely pitied the earthbound.
The daily press was scathing about what was—dodgy stage-management aside—a dreary, earthbound slab of oratory.
The action scenes are pretty terrific, mixing earthbound shoot outs and fist fights with aerial adventure.
Several short song fragments and fey fantasias make hippie oracles like Donovan seem earthbound by comparison.
